title: Stop report flicker from unstable report keys
description: Report detail views are responding to real-time report/block subscriptions, but unstable Date.now-based React keys force report blocks to remount every render. Replace timestamp keys with stable keys so completed reports do not flicker or reload during subscription/refetch updates.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented local fix: removed Date.now()-based React keys from report detail/block rendering, preserved backend block ids through report block transforms, and stopped fetchReportBlocks from writing a synthetic _lastUpdated timestamp. Focused ScoreChampionVersionTimeline test and dashboard typecheck pass.
